title: sphaeranthus kirkii var. cyathuloides
intro: Sphaeranthus kirkii var. cyathuloides is a variant of the Sphaeranthus kirkii plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Sphaeranthus kirkii var. cyathuloides include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
